Question
========
What is the result of the mean of values 1-10?


Answerlist
----------
* 10
* 5
* 5.5
* 2


Solution
========
The answer you should receive is 5.5 - if it differs, then perhaps check your vector contains all the values you expect it to!



Meta-information
================
exname: test quiz
extype: schoice
exsolution: 0010
